name: Nylon
description: A disciplined river guardian Mora. Nylon flows like water but strikes with calculated precision.

Bubble Veil.desc: Reduces damage from the next hit.

Cleanse Flow.desc: Heals slightly and clears minor negative effects.

Riptide Rush.desc: A rushing wave that may lower Speed.

Mist Screen.desc: Lowers enemy Accuracy with watery mist.

Pressure Jet.desc: A pressurized jet that may lower Defense.

name: Thornel
description: A razor-leaf predator clad in living armor. Its twin blade-arms slice with surgical precision.

Razorleaf Rend.desc: Twin leaf blades slash the enemy.

Verdant Guard.desc: Raises Defense with hardened leaf armor.

Sap Strike.desc: Drains a bit of HP from the opponent.

Emerald Blitz.desc: Fast dash slash with increased crit chance.

Bramble Lash.desc: A whip strike that may lower Defense.

name: Terron
description: A stone-armored defender that endures heavy blows and retaliates with crushing force.

Dustwall.desc: Raises Defense with a dust barrier.

Iron Soil.desc: Heals slightly and raises Defense a bit.

Pebble Spray.desc: Shoots sharp pebbles that may lower Accuracy.

Seismic Brace.desc: Reduces damage from the next 2 hits slightly.

name: Sparko
description: A lightning-fast predator that overwhelms enemies with speed and electric bursts.

Arc Feint.desc: A tricky strike that may raise Speed.

Overcharge Snap.desc: A sharp bolt that may lower Defense.

name: Emberu
description: A blazing warrior Mora that grows stronger as battle intensity rises.

Searing Nudge.desc: A small flame burst that may burn.

Kindle Guard.desc: Reduces damage from next hit and raises Attack slightly.

name: Glacyn
description: A silent frost hunter that slows enemies before delivering fatal precision.

Hail Storm.desc: Summons a hail storm that may lower Speed.

Chill Pulse.desc: A cold wave that may lower Attack.

Snow Blind.desc: Lowers the target’s Accuracy with icy mist.

name: Umbrake
description: A lurking shadow Mora that weakens enemies before striking from darkness.

Shadow Drain.desc: Drains a small amount of HP.

Eclipse Pierce.desc: A heavy strike with increased crit chance.

name: Torrivine
description: A jungle brute that traps foes before overwhelming them.

Root Trap.desc: Traps the enemy and lowers Speed.

Canopy Slam.desc: A heavy slam that may lower Defense.

name: Pyrraptor
description: A feral fire beast that attacks in rapid bursts.

Flame Feint.desc: A quick strike that may raise Speed.

Heat Frenzy.desc: Raises Attack but lowers Defense slightly.

name: Zephyra
description: A swift aerial Mora that controls the battlefield with wind currents.

Cyclone Spear.desc: A piercing wind spiral that may lower Defense.

name: Brinlock
description: A calm shoreline Mora that fights with steady rhythm. Brinlock wins by wearing foes down like waves on stone.

Shore Splash.desc: A splash burst that chips the target.

Salt Screen.desc: Raises Defense by coating the body in salt-crystal film.

Current Tug.desc: A pulling strike that may lower the target's Speed.

Pearl Mend.desc: Heals slightly and clears minor negative effects.

Breaker Wave.desc: A heavy wave crash that may lower Defense.

Tide Anchor.desc: Traps the target briefly and lowers Speed.

name: Kindrel
description: A small ember spirit Mora that brightens when challenged. Kindrel fights with quick sparks and playful feints.

Spark Flick.desc: A quick flicking hit with a chance to flinch.

Coal Kick.desc: A sharp kick with burning grit.

Blazing Hop.desc: A fiery leap strike that may raise Speed.

Cinder Coil.desc: A curling flame burst that may burn.

name: Pebbrum
description: A sturdy pebble-backed Mora that never rushes. Pebbrum builds momentum and hits like a rolling stone.

Stone Set.desc: Raises Defense with a grounded stance.

Roll Pressure.desc: A rolling slam that may lower the target’s Defense.

Dust Patch.desc: Reduces damage from the next hit.

Rock Steady.desc: Raises Defense and lowers Speed slightly.

name: Gustling
description: A breezy scout Mora that dances through gaps in defense. Gustling fights with sharp gusts and sudden turns.

Cyclone Jolt.desc: A swirling blast that may lower Accuracy.

Gust Hook.desc: Traps the target in wind pressure and lowers Speed.

name: Noctik
description: A dusk-stalker Mora that prefers misdirection over brute force. Noctik weakens targets before finishing cleanly.

Gloom Pin.desc: Traps the target and lowers Speed.

Night Drain.desc: Drains a bit of HP from the opponent.

Eclipse Cut.desc: A clean cut with increased crit chance.

Shadow Focus.desc: Raises Attack slightly and lowers Defense slightly.

name: Voltrix
description: A sharp-minded Volt Mora that stores charge in its core plates. Voltrix strikes fast, then punishes mistakes.

Arc Slash.desc: A charged slash that may paralyze.

Magnet Clamp.desc: Traps the target and lowers Speed.

Thunder Pike.desc: A piercing bolt that may lower Defense.

Overload Burst.desc: A heavy discharge that may lower own Defense slightly.

Static Cut.desc: A sharp hit that may lower Accuracy.

name: Frosten
description: A disciplined frost sentinel Mora. Frosten slows enemies with cold pressure, then locks them down with clean hits.

Chill Bite.desc: A freezing bite that may lower Speed.

Frost Hook.desc: Traps the target in icy chains.

Snowmelt Sip.desc: Heals slightly and clears minor negative effects.

Glacial Break.desc: A heavy ice smash that may lower Defense.

Cold Pulse.desc: A cold wave that may lower Attack.

name: Briarhorn
description: A forest charger Mora that turns defense into offense. Briarhorn grows tougher each time it’s challenged.

Thicket Ram.desc: A horn-first rush wrapped in vines.

Emerald Stampede.desc: A heavy stampede that may flinch.

Vine Brace.desc: Reduces damage from next hit and raises Defense slightly.

name: Cindrake
description: A young drake Mora that fights with controlled heat. Cindrake is relentless once it smells weakness.

Ember Fang.desc: A fiery bite that may burn.

Heat Focus.desc: Raises Attack and lowers Defense slightly.

Flame Sweep.desc: A wide flame arc that may lower Accuracy.

Inferno Lunge.desc: A brutal lunge that may lower own Speed slightly.

Searing Breath.desc: A hot breath blast that may lower Defense.

name: Dunebral
description: A desert-wanderer Mora with stone plates and sharp instincts. Dunebral controls the fight by slowing and breaking defenses.

Stone Mantle.desc: Raises Defense and reduces damage from the next hit slightly.

Quicksand Hold.desc: Traps the target and lowers Speed.

Ridge Breaker.desc: A heavy strike that may lower Defense.

Desert Collapse.desc: A crushing slam that may flinch.

Stone Shrapnel.desc: Sharp debris burst that may lower Accuracy.

name: Flarion
description: A blazing flame fox Mora that grows fiercer as battle intensifies.

Blaze Fang.desc: A fiery bite that may burn.

name: Terravex
description: A rock gorilla Mora that smashes through defenses.

name: Aquarion
description: A sleek water serpent Mora that overwhelms with tides.

name: Thornex
description: A towering plant lizard Mora that dominates with overwhelming vines.

name: Umbrix
description: A shadow beast Mora that weakens foes before striking lethally.

name: Ignix
description: A fierce fire lizard Mora that fights with burning precision.

name: Frostel
description: An ice fox Mora that freezes momentum and finishes with clean precision.

Frost Slash.desc: A sharp icy cut that may lower Speed.

Ice Pulse.desc: Cold pulse blast that chills the target.

Freeze Bite.desc: Icy bite with a chance to slow.

Snow Veil.desc: Lowers enemy accuracy with swirling snow.

Chill Step.desc: Raises Speed by skating on frost.

Permafrost Lock.desc: Traps the target in ice and lowers Speed.

name: Stormix
description: A storm-bird Mora that mixes wind pressure with crackling static.

Thunder Dive.desc: A diving strike charged with storm energy.

Storm Pulse.desc: A pulsing storm blast that may lower Accuracy.

Lightning Wing.desc: Wing slash with sparks; may paralyze.

Cyclone Crash.desc: A spiraling crash that may flinch.

Sky Pressure.desc: Raises Attack slightly and lowers enemy Speed slightly.

Thunder Screech.desc: Lowers enemy Defense with a piercing cry.

name: Drakonis
description: A winged dragon Mora with glowing scales, feared for raw dominance.

Crush Tail.desc: Tail smash that may lower Defense.

name: Pyrix
description: A fire lion Mora that grows more dangerous the longer the battle lasts.

Flame Charge.desc: Charging flame tackle that may raise Speed.

Fire Roar.desc: Raises Attack and intimidates (lowers enemy Attack slightly).

Blaze Guard.desc: Reduces damage from the next hit.

Molten Fang.desc: A savage bite that may burn.

name: Cryovex
description: An ice dragon Mora that crushes rhythm and locks enemies in cold control.

Freeze Strike.desc: Clean ice slash that may lower Speed.

Snowmelt Mend.desc: Heals slightly and clears minor debuffs.

Crystal Tail.desc: Tail smash that may lower Defense.

name: Voltaris
description: A lightning dragon Mora that punishes slow reactions with brutal surges.

Static Cage.desc: Traps enemy in electricity; lowers Speed.

Thunder Pike.desc: Piercing bolt that may lower Defense.

Overload Roar.desc: Lowers enemy Defense with a crackling roar.

name: Floravex
description: A giant tree beast Mora that crushes opponents under living wood and roots.

Spore Cloud.desc: Spore cloud attack that weakens focus.

name: Terragon
description: A rock dragon Mora that turns the ground itself into a weapon.

Crush Bite.desc: Heavy bite that may lower Defense.

Duststorm.desc: Sand and dust blast that may lower Accuracy.

name: Luxar
description: A winged light guardian Mora that overwhelms foes with radiant pressure.

Shine Storm.desc: Radiant storm that may lower Accuracy.

Glow Mend.desc: Heals slightly and clears minor debuffs.

Judgment Beam.desc: A heavy beam that may lower Defense.

name: Nocturn
description: A dark-winged Mora that strikes from above and vanishes into void mist.

Dark Storm.desc: A swirling storm of shadow energy.

name: Aquavex
description: A colossal ocean serpent Mora that commands crushing tidal force.

name: Infernos
description: A lava titan Mora that turns the battlefield into molten ruin.

Lava Strike.desc: A molten punch that may burn.

Flame Slam.desc: A heavy slam wrapped in fire.

Heat Armor.desc: Raises Defense by hardening into magma.

Blazing Aura.desc: Raises Attack and lowers Speed slightly.

Cinder Quake.desc: A fiery stomp that may flinch.

Melt Guard.desc: Reduces damage from the next hit.

Scorch Fang.desc: A savage bite with burning heat.

name: Abyssor
description: A giant void Mora with crimson eyes that devours light and hope.

Abyss Strike.desc: A crushing void hit that may lower Defense.

Void Chains.desc: Traps the target and lowers Speed.

Eclipse Tear.desc: Shadow burst that may lower Accuracy.

Gloom Barrier.desc: Reduces damage from the next hit.

name: Celestion
description: A star-powered Mora with a galaxy body. Reality bends around its orbit.

Void Pulse.desc: A strange pulse that may lower Speed.

Gravity Lock.desc: Traps the target and lowers Speed.

Stellar Burst.desc: Star explosion that may lower Defense.

Supernova End.desc: A supernova blast that shakes the field.

name: Ignivar
description: A massive fire dragon Mora whose wings scorch the sky itself.

Inferno Storm.desc: A raging firestorm engulfs the battlefield.

Fire Devour.desc: A devastating bite that drains energy.

name: Terralord
description: A giant stone titan Mora that commands tectonic destruction.

name: Voltaris Prime
description: The pure lightning ascension of Voltaris, condensed into raw voltage form.

name: Luminary
description: An angelic Mora with radiant wings that blinds enemies with divine brilliance.

name: Noctyra
description: The Queen of Shadows, ruler of the deepest void dominion.

Shadow Destroy.desc: Conjures shadows that phase through opponent.

name: Aquatyr
description: A colossal ocean titan Mora that commands crushing tidal authority.

Aqua Devour.desc: A crushing bite that drains HP.

name: Drakoryx
description: The Dragon King Mora whose roar bends the battlefield to its will.

name: Eternyx
description: A Mora formed from time energy itself. Eternyx distorts reality with every move.

name: Omnaris
description: A Mora containing all elemental forces in unstable balance.

Omni Strike.desc: A strike infused with all elements.

name: Aetherion
description: A radiant supreme guardian Mora that channels celestial harmony.

Celestial Beam.desc: A beam of celestial radiance, with energy from the celestial world.

name: Bup
description: A bubbly amphibious Mora. It inflates its cheeks to absorb impacts before spitting water back.

name: Sproutlet
description: A walking seedling Mora that thrives in sunlight. Its roots are surprisingly strong.

name: Dustmite
description: A tiny, rock-covered scavenger Mora. It easily blends into rocky terrain to ambush prey.

name: Staticbug
description: A sparking insectoid Mora. It rubs its legs together to generate tiny but painful shocks.

name: Ashling
description: A crawling coal Mora that leaves a trail of soot. Its body temperature spikes when threatened.

name: Flurrybat
description: A snowy bat Mora that freezes the moisture in the air to create icy projectiles.

Icy Wind.desc: A cold gust that may lower Speed.

Icicle Drop.desc: Drops a sharp icicle from above.

name: Gloomtail
description: A shadowy rat Mora. It hides in the darkest corners and steals energy from unsuspecting prey.

name: Breezefluff
description: A floating dandelion-like Mora. It rides the wind to escape predators.

name: Puddlekin
description: A living droplet Mora. It is very hard to grasp and slips out of danger easily.

name: Twiggy
description: A stick-insect Mora. It perfectly mimics a dry branch until it strikes.

Poke.desc: A sharp poke with a twig.

Woodpecker.desc: A rapid series of sharp strikes.

name: Gravelback
description: A sturdy badger-like Mora with a rocky carapace. It charges headfirst into danger.

Rock Smash.desc: A heavy punch that breaks rocks.

Bulldoze.desc: A charging attack that lowers Speed.

name: Joltwing
description: A charged bird Mora. The friction of its feathers creates thunderclaps.

name: Scorchmane
description: A fiery hyena Mora that travels in packs. Its laughter sounds like crackling flames.

Fire Fang.desc: A flaming bite that may burn.

Ember Toss.desc: Throws a chunk of burning coal.

name: Frostfang
description: An icy wolf Mora. It hunts relentlessly across frozen tundras.

Ice Fang.desc: A freezing bite that may flinch.

name: Duskprowl
description: A shadowy panther Mora that is virtually invisible at night.

Ambush.desc: A surprise attack from the shadows.

name: Obsidihorn
description: A massive beetle-like Mora with a horn made of volcanic glass. It is nearly impervious to physical strikes.

Obsidian Bash.desc: A heavy horn strike that may lower enemy Defense.

Glass Armor.desc: Sharply raises Defense but lowers Speed.

Sharp Fragment.desc: Shoots glass shards that cause bleeding.

name: Valtopher
description: A sleek, electric feline that moves like a bolt of lightning. It leaves ozone-scented air in its wake.

Plasma Bolt.desc: Fires a concentrated ball of electricity.

Storm Step.desc: A dash attack that avoids the next hit.

name: Florageist
description: A mystical deer Mora draped in bioluminescent moss. It can vanish into thin air by mimicking shadows.

Spirit Bloom.desc: Drains HP from the target to heal itself.

Nature's Veil.desc: Raises Evasion and clears status effects.

Thorny Overgrowth.desc: Summons vines to crush the opponent.

Pollen Sleep.desc: Puts the enemy into a deep slumber.

name: Pyre-Griffin
description: A majestic winged beast whose feathers burn with a blue flame. It rules the volcanic peaks.

Heat Wave.desc: A blast of hot air that may burn the foe.

Sky Dive.desc: A high-speed dive from the clouds.

name: Abyss-Lurk
description: A multi-eyed serpent that lives in the deepest rifts. It feeds on the fear of its prey.

Gaze of Terror.desc: Paralyzes the foe with pure fear.

Shadow Maw.desc: A bite that drains the target's energy.

Dark Pulse.desc: A release of concentrated dark energy.

Nightmare Bind.desc: Traps the foe in shadow for 2 turns.

name: Glacier-Rex
description: An ancient reptilian Mora frozen in ice for eons. Its breath can turn a forest into a tundra.

Frozen Bite.desc: A bite that has a high freeze chance.

Hail Shield.desc: Creates a shield of ice that heals HP.

Ice Crusher.desc: Slams the foe with an icy tail.

name: Tidal-Serpent
description: A long, graceful sea serpent that controls the tides. Sailors believe seeing one brings storms.

Whirlpool.desc: Traps the enemy in a vortex.

Tail Wave.desc: A slapping attack using a massive wave.

name: Aero-Drakon
description: A dragon-like Mora that lacks scales, covered instead in streamlined feathers.

Talon Rake.desc: Sharp claws that ignore Defense buffs.

name: Iron-Sentinel
description: A Mora that looks like a living statue. It was built by ancient civilizations to guard temples.

Guardian Strike.desc: A punch that scales with Defense.

Fortify.desc: Maxes out Defense but prevents moving next turn.

Stone Rain.desc: Rocks fall from the sky on the foe.

Ancient Beam.desc: A beam of light from its singular eye.

name: Nebula-Wisp
description: A floating orb of starlight. It doesn't seem to belong to this world.

Void Rift.desc: Opens a small hole in space-time.

name: Magma-Tortoise
description: Its shell is a miniature volcano. It moves slowly but can erupt at any moment.

Lava Spit.desc: Deals damage and burns the foe.

Eruption.desc: Deals more damage if HP is high.

Shell Bash.desc: A heavy slam with the shell.

name: Crag-Goat
description: A nimble climber that can stand on near-vertical cliffs. Its head is harder than diamonds.

Headbutt.desc: A solid strike with the forehead.

Rock Climb.desc: A jumping attack from high ground.

Focus Charge.desc: Guarantees the next hit is a Critical.

name: Spectral-Raven
description: A messenger of the abyss. Its caw is said to be an omen of bad luck.

name: Venom-Spire
description: A predatory plant Mora that lures insects with a sweet scent before injecting neurotoxins.

Fatal Bloom.desc: A massive release of toxic energy.

name: Spark-Core
description: A floating mechanical Mora that seems to be powered by an infinite battery.

name: Crag-Titan
description: A walking mountain. Its steps cause tremors that can be felt for miles.

Rock Slide.desc: Large boulders fall on the foe.

Heavy Slam.desc: Uses weight to crush the enemy.

name: Storm-Herald
description: A bird-like Mora that lives within lightning clouds. It only descends during the fiercest storms.

Static Wind.desc: Wind that has a 30% chance to paralyze.

name: Blight-Bloom
description: A beautiful flower with a deadly secret. Its pollen causes vivid hallucinations.

Petal Dance.desc: Attacks for 3 turns then confuses self.

name: Cinder-Drake
description: A wingless dragon that swims in magma. Its scales are harder than steel.

Heat Crash.desc: The heavier the user, the more damage.

name: Phantom-Stalker
description: A lean, ghostly canine that tracks its prey through their dreams.

Curse.desc: Trades HP to damage foe every turn.

name: Frost-Warden
description: A humanoid Mora made of permafrost. It guards the gates of the Ice Kingdom.

name: Vortex-Manta
description: A floating ray that creates whirlpools in the sky to trap its avian prey.

Brine.desc: Damage doubles if foe HP is < 50%.

Tidal Wave.desc: A massive wave that hits everyone.

name: Cloud-Whale
description: A colossal Mora that drifts through the stratosphere. It is often mistaken for a storm cloud.

Sky Drop.desc: Takes foe into sky for 1 turn.

name: Cyber-Byte
description: A Mora that exists half in the digital world. It can manipulate data to its advantage.

Tri-Attack.desc: Chance to burn, freeze or paralyze.

name: Gem-Tortoise
description: Its shell is encrusted with rare diamonds. It is highly valued by treasure hunters.

name: Infernal-Centaur
description: A warrior Mora that leaves a trail of burning hoofprints. It carries a lance forged in the planet's core.

Blazing Lance.desc: Signature: A burning strike that pierces all defenses.

Flare Blitz.desc: A desperate fiery charge that damages user.

War Cry.desc: Boosts Atk and Spd for 3 turns.

Overheat.desc: Powerful, but sharply lowers Special Atk.

Sun's Blessing.desc: Heals user and boosts Flame moves.

name: Abyssal-Hydra
description: Each of its three heads has a different personality and a different way of killing.

Triple Bite.desc: Signature: Hits 3 times in one turn.

Regenerate.desc: Heals 40% HP and grows a head back.

Abyssal Maw.desc: A bite that heals for 50% damage dealt.

name: Sky-Leviathan
description: A massive serpent that swims through the air. Its presence changes the weather instantly.

Sky Rupture.desc: Signature: Tears a hole in the sky to strike.

Cyclone Slam.desc: Slamming the foe with wind pressure.

name: Primal-Golem
description: The first Mora ever created from the earth. It contains the raw energy of the planet.

Primal Fist.desc: Signature: A punch that never misses and ignores Def.

Hammer Arm.desc: High damage, but lowers own Speed.

name: Tesla-Dragon
description: A mechanical dragon powered by a miniature sun. It generates a magnetic field that disrupts electronics.

Tesla Coil.desc: Signature: Chains damage to multiple enemies.

name: Zovax
description: The First Crag. It is said Zovax was the very first entity to step through the Primordial Rift. Its body is made of shifting star-matter.

Rift Fracture.desc: Signature: Cracks the reality around the foe, dealing massive damage.

Void Eater.desc: Heals HP by consuming the enemy's last used move's energy.

Nebula Cloak.desc: Makes the user untargetable for 1 turn.

Cosmic Crush.desc: Slams the foe with the weight of a dying star.

Singularity.desc: A black hole that pulls all enemies in. Massive damage.

Eternal Rest.desc: Cures all status and maxes Energy, but user sleeps for 2 turns.

name: Ruvon
description: The Core Burner. Ruvon lives in the deepest layer of Lumora's core, keeping the planet's heat stable with its Rift-fire feathers.

Pyro Nova.desc: Signature: An explosion of blue fire that burns everything.

Mumu Strike.desc: A rapid-fire series of flaming punches.

Blazing Wing.desc: A physical strike with wings of fire.

Solar Beam.desc: Requires 1 turn of sunlight to charge.

Heat Sink.desc: Absorbs all incoming Flame damage to heal.

Final Flare.desc: User faints, but deals astronomical damage.

name: Belo
description: The World Root. Belo's antlers are actually the branches of a tree that existed before the sky cracked. It heals the land wherever it walks.

Eden's Gaze.desc: Signature: All enemies lose 15% HP per turn while Belo is active.

Nature Power.desc: Damage type changes based on terrain.

Forest Guard.desc: Creates a shield that absorbs 50% of damage for the team.

Root Bind.desc: Traps the foe and prevents switching.

World Bloom.desc: Heals the user for 100% of damage dealt.

name: Kaza
description: The Sky Splitter. Kaza was born from the wind that rushed out of the crack in the sky. It moves so fast it appears to be in two places at once.

Sonic Ripper.desc: Signature: Always moves first. Ignores Evasion.

Zaza Gust.desc: A fast, C-V-C-V patterned wind blast.

Tailwind.desc: Triples the speed of the entire party.

Air Pressure.desc: Prevents the enemy from using any Status moves.

Cyclone.desc: A massive vortex that can confuse the foe.

Sky Uppercut.desc: Hits enemies even if they are 'flying' or 'diving'.

Mirror Image.desc: Creates a decoy that takes 1 hit.

Gale Force.desc: The strongest wind move; requires a turn to recharge.

name: Nira
description: The Ocean Mind. Nira's body is composed of Primordial Water. It is said to contain the memories of everyone who has ever lived in Lumora.

Memory Flood.desc: Signature: Deals damage based on how many moves the enemy has used.

Pressure Sink.desc: Sharply lowers the enemy's Attack and Speed.

Mist Veil.desc: Protects the party from all status effects.

Tsunami.desc: A world-ending wave that hits all opponents.
